step1.title: Select a Date or Time Range
step1.desc: Click on a specific day in the Month view, or click and drag across time slots in the Week/Day view.

step2.title: Enter Event Details
step2.desc: A modal will appear. Enter a title for your event (e.g., "Study Group").

step3.title: Choose Time Options
step3.desc: By default, "All Day" is checked. Uncheck it to specify exact Start and End times.

step4.title: Create Event
step4.desc: Click the "Create" button to save your event to the calendar.

move.title: Move Event:
move.desc: Drag and drop your personal events (green) to move them to a different day or time.

resize.title: Resize Event:
resize.desc: Drag the bottom edge of a timed event to change its duration.

homework.title: Homework:
homework.desc: Homework deadlines (blue) are automatically added by your teachers and cannot be moved.
